messages.new_offer: A seller has submitted a new offer for your request.
messages.first_quote: Good news! Your first offer is here for the part you requested.
messages.milestone_3_quotes: You now have 3 competitive quotes. Time to compare!
messages.new_quote: A seller has submitted a new offer for your request.
messages.quote_accepted: Your quote was accepted by the buyer.
messages.quote_won: Your quote was accepted. Check your orders to proceed.
messages.quote_rejected: Your offer was not selected by the buyer.
messages.quote_status_change: A seller has updated their quote.
messages.new_lead: A new potential buyer is interested in your parts.
messages.request_update: Your request status has been updated.
messages.support_message: You have a new message from support.
messages.spam_flag: A request has been flagged as spam and requires review.
messages.abandoned_request: A request has expired due to inactivity.
messages.bottleneck_alert: A system bottleneck has been detected.
messages.account_approved: Your seller account has been approved. You can now start selling!
messages.new_seller_waitlist: A new seller has registered and is waiting for your approval.
messages.credit_request: A seller has submitted a credit purchase request.
messages.credit_approved: Your credit request has been approved. Credits have been added to your account.
messages.credit_rejected: Your credit request was declined. Check your dashboard for details.
messages.new_quote_batched: You now have {{count}} offers on {{partName}}. Open it to compare and choose.
messages.quote_status_change_price_updated: A seller revised their offer for {{partName}}. Check the updated price and terms.
messages.quote_status_change_rejected: The buyer reviewed all offers for {{partName}} and chose a different one. Keep bidding on other requests!
messages.quote_status_change_unrejected: Good news! The buyer reconsidered and your offer for {{partName}} is back in consideration.
messages.quote_status_change_revoked: The buyer revoked their acceptance for {{partName}}. Your offer is back in consideration — the request is still open.
messages.quote_status_change_reminder: The seller is waiting for you to confirm the deal for '{{partName}}'. Please mark it as fulfilled once you receive the part.
messages.quote_status_change_fulfilled_winner: The buyer confirmed the deal for '{{partName}}'. The request is now fulfilled — contact them to arrange delivery.
messages.quote_status_change_fulfilled_loser: The request for '{{partName}}' was fulfilled by another seller. Your offer was not selected this time — keep bidding on open requests!
messages.credit_rejected_with_reason: Your request for {{credits}} credits was declined. Reason: {{adminNote}}. Please contact support if you have questions.
